# PERF-017 negative: strings.Join hoisted out of the request loop
lang: go
file: PERF-017-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Handle(c *gin.Context) {
	header := c.GetHeader("Accept-Language")
	parts := strings.Split(header, ",")
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"languages": strings.Join(parts, ";")})
}
